title: Poké Discs
description: A resource pack that overwrites vanilla music discs with Pokémon music.
body:
## 🎵 Listen to your favorite Pokémon tunes in Minecraft!
Poké Discs is a resource pack that adds Pokémon music into Minecraft via the music discs.\
All music discs become **_Poké Discs_**, and have had their sprites updated to reflect the name change. 

Music includes **towns,** **battles** and **menu themes** from all generations.

### 📃 Song List

Every music disc has been converted into a Poké Disc. The following is a list of all songs available in game.

> **_Jubilife City (Day)_**\
**_Jubilife City (Night)_**\
**_Pokémon XY Theme_**\
**_New Bark Town_**\
**_Eterna City (Day)_**\
**_Eterna City (Night)_**\
**_The Dreamyard_**\
**_Lavender Town_**\
**_Tower of Heaven_**\
**_Eterna Forest_**\
**_Route 201_**\
**_HGSS Champion Battle_**\
**_Canalave City (Day)_**\
**_Canalave City (Night)_**\
**_HGSS Trainer Battle_**\
**_Pokémon Animated Theme_** (Not available in 1.19)



Songs were assigned relative to disc length.\
As of 1.20, custom songs are limited to the length of the original disc.

### 📀 Textures
All Poké Discs have been updated with custom sprites that resemble Pokéballs in the center of the record! 

![poke discs on display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdba8532781c48c8aa45cc8a7f57add1769e55c7.png) ![master disc](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cb98b73cdb60823624f80300593eb38e4c16a11.png)

### 🤜 Compatibility
- ✅ All game versions 1.19-1.20.4
- ✅ Pairs great with [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)
- ✅ Supports [Amendments](https://modrinth.com/mod/amendments)
